nodes.context: A gang associated with the Bandidos Motorcycle Club, acting as a street gang and youth branch.
An outlaw motorcycle club with which X-Team is associated.
The Hells Angels' equivalent of the X-Team, a support group.
An outlaw motorcycle club, parent organization of the Red & White Crew.
A Swedish gang involved in conflict with X-Team.
A criminal network in Södertälje, Sweden, involved in conflict with X-Team.
A motorcycle club involved in a conflict with X-Team in Germany.
A youth branch formed by Bandidos after X-Team disbanded in Denmark.
A gang in Gothenburg, Sweden, involved in conflict with X-Team.

edges.evidence_quote: X-Team is a gang associated with the Bandidos Motorcycle Club.
edges.context: X-Team is a support and recruitment gang for the Bandidos, carrying out crimes on their behalf.

edges.evidence_quote: A gang war involving the X-Team and the Red & White Crew – the Hells Angels' equivalent of the X-Team – in Næstved broke out on 6 January 2002
edges.context: X-Team and Red & White Crew fought a gang war in Næstved and later in Gothenburg.

edges.evidence_quote: X-Team has been involved in a conflict with the Original Gangsters (OGs) that was initiated by nightclub altercation...
edges.context: X-Team and Original Gangsters engaged in a violent conflict in Sweden.

edges.evidence_quote: A conflict between Bernard 'Berno' Khouri, leader of the Södertälje mafia (Södertäljenätverket), and Dany Moussa, the founder of the X-Team in Södertälje, resulted in a war between the groups
edges.context: X-Team and Södertälje mafia fought a war over control of Södertälje's criminal market.

edges.evidence_quote: On 28 April 2012, an X-Team member used his car to force a member of the Gremium Motorcycle Club off the road near Westerkappeln.
edges.context: X-Team member attacked a Gremium MC member, indicating conflict.

edges.evidence_quote: The Bandidos later former another youth branch called Mexican Team Work.
edges.context: Mexican Team Work is a successor youth branch formed by Bandidos after X-Team disbanded in Denmark.

edges.evidence_quote: A struggle for control of the drug trade in the Gårdsten and Lövgärdet areas of northeast Gothenburg between X-Team and the Gårdstensalliansen (Gårdstens Alliance) gang began in August 2008.
edges.context: X-Team and Gårdstensalliansen fought over drug trade territory.
